title: Wolf v. Colorado, 338 U.S. 25 (1949) — overruled precedent
author: Supreme Court of the United States (opinion of the Court by Frankfurter, J.)
bias_or_interest: Primary judicial record of the precedent Mapp overruled.
relevant_locations: Holding (Fourth Amendment applies to states, but the federal exclusionary remedy does not)
notes: Wolf held the 4th Amendment binds the states via the 14th but did NOT impose the exclusionary remedy; Mapp overruled that remedy point.

title: Weeks v. United States, 232 U.S. 383 (1914) — origin of the federal exclusionary rule
author: Supreme Court of the United States (opinion by Day, J.)
bias_or_interest: Primary record establishing the exclusionary rule in federal cases.
relevant_locations: Holding (illegally seized evidence inadmissible in federal court)
notes: Background: the rule existed federally since 1914; Mapp extended it to the states.
